## What does this PR do?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect content, broken code)
- [ ] New content (algorithm, pattern, design, guide)
- [ ] Improvement (better explanation, updated data)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
- [ ] JS files run without errors (`node <filename>`)
- [ ] Follows existing code style and conventions
- [ ] Markdown files use emoji headers and complexity tables
- [ ] Cross-links to related files are included where relevant
